reviews.title: Not worth the money
reviews.text: We stayed 1 night at Ritz-Carlton Shanghai, as a transit before we flew home. I purposely booked the room with Pearl Tower view. The view was great, but all the furniture were facing away from the tower. Wife and I wanted to chill by the window enjoying the view, we couldn't. And here's the best part, we checked in late, and no one told us the lights are switched off at 10pm. We were speaking to the front desk staff, for a while, asking about dining options etc. We went out for dinner and were super disappointed the tower was in darkness when we returned to our room at about 10.15pm.  You'd think someone would've told us when guests booked the PEARL TOWER view room duh. The room was also not clean, we found an M&M on the floor, and hair stuck at the bathroom drain. As were there only a night, and we had to leave in the morning, we didn't get to enjoy the facilities. Overall, it's a nice hotel, but definitely not worth the price we paid.

reviews.title: Great hotel with good service!
reviews.text:
I received a free upgrade from river view to the Oriental Pearl TV Tower view at the front desk as I checked in. A few days before, I was at the Aura for afternoon tea, perhaps that was why they offered me the free upgrade. Love the beautiful room, the awesome bath tub, and extremely comfortable bed. The small tv in front of the bath tub was not very clear though. I really did not like the breakfast spread. It is quite subjective, but I was not impressed by the spread. I did like the juice offered though. Most of the chefs did not understand English, and when I wanted to customize the ingredients for the eggs, all the cooks there did not understand me, except for one senior-looking chef who cooked my eggs for me. The same case was for the noodles section; the cook did not understand a single word of English. I am a little surprised that a luxurious hotel like Ritz-Carlton had only a handful of staff who can speak and understand English.

Having said that though, the stay was very satisfying only due to the beautiful and comfortable room.

reviews.title: The Ritz-Carlton Shanghai Pudong
reviews.text:
The Ritz-Carlton Shanghai Pudong what beautiful classy place. From the stage I arrived and till I checked out the staff went above and beyond too make my stay extremely comfortable and enjoyable stay. 

My room was nice and spacious with a fantastic view of the harbour and the room amenities where fantastic with a great shower with great pressure and bath to soak up those hard days exploring the beautiful city and its attractions.  The housekeeping kept my room nice and clean and even would setup my bed for  bedtime with bottles of waters on the bedside with glasses and next to the bed slippers, I could keeping going but you do have to experience it for yourself. 

Room service was a restaurant experience within itself and the staff took great care too prepare and serve food.

The restaurant and lounge section, what a experience and fantastic food and service. The food was cooked too perfection and the staff help too make it fantastic dinning experience. 

The rooftop bar, I went there on a Saturday night and the atmosphere was incredible and the DJ set was something you see out of those VIP rooftop parties with a absolute great view overlooking the city. 

The hotel location is great and it connects into the shopping mall with its high end vendors and on levels 3 - 4 with fantastic restaurants.

Overall I had excellent stay and would highly recommend The Ritz-Carlton Shanghai Pudong and big thank you to its staff for its excellent service and warm welcome.

reviews.title: Service and overall amenities (barely) save an outdated, pricey property.
reviews.positives:
The pros of the Ritz-Carlton are spearheaded by the staff and the impeccable service. Jerry (from the lounge) helped me check in, ensured I got a great room and helped me get some perks. His help was a great start of our stay. But honestly, all staff was great and extremely professional.

The room I stayed in (4116) has a great view of the bund and was very spacious. The shower had amazing temperature and water pressure, the WiFi was stable and fast and overall amenities were good. I was impressed by housekeeping and their flexibility to make up the room at all times. The turn-down service was great as well. Overall, the staff and service make you feel like a very valued guest, and that goes a long way.

The location is good too. Close to line 2 and 9 metro, on top of IFC mall (luxury and expensive) and across the street of the Superbrand mall (accessible, everyday shops and restaurants). Right next to the famous TV tower and walking distance to the riverside.
reviews.negatives:
Honestly, the property is aging and it shows. If I pay nearly $400 per night for a room, I expect it to be in mint condition. However, the room shows its age and makes you feel they forgot to remodel 5-7 years ago. Also, the buttons to handle the curtains and lights are dated; it feels VERY 1990s cool, not what I expect for this price. See images of the scuffed and worn out furniture attached. The carpet was also old and not well positioned. Overall, there is a gap between the price, service and amenities and the state of the room. It’s really a bummer.

Secondly, Flair bar is nice, but very overpriced. The cocktails are expensive and underwhelming (sub-par made) and the wine was just bad (our party tried 3 different ones). Having to pay $25-$30 for a drink on uncomfortable seats and THEN getting hit with VAT+service charge on top of that (16%) is really not OK for what you get.

Lastly, only one English TV channel. Really?!

reviews.title: Hotels where you can see the best night view.
reviews.text: From the moment I entered, the staff welcomed me kindly, making the check-in process pleasant, and it was the same during checkout. The room was not only clean but also had perfect amenities, and it was convenient to easily adjust everything from the lighting to the curtains with just one button. I experienced two hotels in Taiwan and chose the Ritz-Carlton as my last destination, and among all the five-star hotels I encountered during the week, the Ritz-Carlton was the best for relaxation. The bed was particularly better than any other hotel. I usually have trouble sleeping in different beds, but I slept so well at the Ritz-Carlton that I almost didn't want to get up. I even wanted to ask about the bed brand during checkout, haha. The only downside was that when using Alipay to settle deposits or payments at the Flair Bar, system errors occurred quite frequently, but having a physical card would mitigate this issue. Overall, I was very comfortable in this hotel, and thanks to it, I had a great time in China, which I hadn't expected much from. I was so satisfied that I would want to visit Shanghai again, and if I do, I would definitely recommend this hotel.

It's heartwarming to hear about the courteous and helpful hotel staff, and it's gestures like the assistance from Zora at reception that can make a trip memorable. A comfortable bed and a good night's rest are the cherries on top of a pleasant travel experience, setting the tone for the adventures that await in a new place. May the rest of your journey be filled with more delightful encounters and restful nights!

reviews.title: Pleasant day hotel stay
reviews.text: During this trip to Shanghai, I stayed at the Ritz Carlton, experiencing excellent service and very good room facilities. They also provided welcome snacks. Thank you to the area manager, Ms. Tang Qing, for her arrangements; she was very polite and provided excellent service. In addition, the hotel room had a city view and a beautiful night view of the Shanghai Bund. It is definitely a hotel worth staying in Shanghai.

The top floor “Flair” bar is a must visit even if you don’t stay at this hotel. The internet is a mess, be sure to be covered with enough data if you are on a business trip.

reviews.title: おすすめします
reviews.text: スタッフのご対応がとても良かったです。

reviews.title: 素晴らしいホテル
reviews.text: クラブフロアに一泊しました。ホテル内の全てのスタッフのおもてなしの心に感動しました。ドアマンの来訪に、何が起こったのか一瞬戸惑いましたが、メッセージカードと中国のお餅をプレゼントするために来てくれたのです。思いもよらない嬉しいサプライズに、驚きました。片言の英語での会話でしたが、また二年目の再会とお互い言葉の勉強を頑張る約束をしました。クラブラウンジのマネージャーにも、色々な気配りをして頂いて、本当にリッツカールトン浦東に決めて良かったです。また是非泊まりたい最高のホテルです。
reviews.room_type: Club lounge access, Guest room, 1 King, City view

reviews.title: 貫禄
reviews.text:
部屋の内装はシンプルかつ重厚感たっぷりで、大きな窓から上海を見下ろす景色はムード抜群でした。

屋上のバーテラスや朝食なども楽しみたかったですが、お金がないので次回のお楽しみにしました。それでも十分満足です。

小さな魅力ですが、地下鉄駅から直接、涼しくて綺麗な地下街（ブランドショップ街）を通って、そのままホテルに辿り着けるのも素敵でした。安心安全快適。



さすがリッツカールトン。他のホテルにも泊まりましたが、高級感は別格ですね。
reviews.positives: 部屋は最高級、景色も最高

reviews.title: 最高

reviews.title: Great for couples!
reviews.positives: We chose here for the view - our room had the view to the signature 3 tall buildings in Lujiazui. And the breakfast restaurant and the rooftop bar Flair has amazing view to the pearl tower. All the staff were nice and helpful, in general the service was great! The room was spacious, but I wouldn't say it's big, compare to other luxury hotels in Shanghai. The bathroom area is great, spacious and had everything I need.
reviews.negatives: Closet area was small, and there's no proper full body mirror.

部屋からの眺めも素晴らしく、上海を満喫できました。
屋上のフレアでは上海の素晴らしい景色を眺めながらおいしい料理を堪能することができ、特別な思いでになりました。

reviews.title: The Ritz Pudong is a no brainer. In typical Ritz fashion you get what you would expect and more.
reviews.positives: Excellent location in the middle of the Pudong area. Next to a metro station so it is easy to reach everything.

reviews.title: やっぱりリッツは最高級のホテルでした
reviews.text:
はじめてリッツカールトンに泊まりました。
部屋の家具・設備は大変素晴らしく、大きな窓から光が十分に入り、部屋はとても明るく、大きなバスタブ、２つある洗面台、柔らかい寝具など、すべての設備に大満足でした。
ロケーションも駅のすぐ隣ということでアクセスがよく、テレビ塔のすぐ隣で部屋からもよく見えて景色もすばらしいです。
部屋やロビーからでもインターネットがつながりました。
朝食もおいしかったです。、
reviews.positives: 設備、ロケーション

reviews.title: Amazing service but a few small issues
reviews.positives: Service was absolutely top-notch! We don’t speak Chinese and ordered food to the wrong Ritz Carlton in Shanghai, so they quickly communicated with the other hotel and sent the food via taxi to our correct hotel! The pool and the views are amazing!
reviews.negatives:
The WiFi didn’t really work. Even though I’m an Elite Marriott member the WiFi was basically not working.
Also the lobby is in the 52nd floor so if you need to go to your room or leave from your room you always need to change the elevator on the 52nd floor.

reviews.title: ไร้ที่ติ
reviews.text:
นอนโรงแรมดีๆ มาหลายโรงแรมมากๆ แต่โรงแรมนี้แตกต่าง กับที่อื่นอย่างเห็นได้ชัดเจน

ห้องพักใหญ่ สะอาด วิวดี แนะนำให้พักฝั่ง The Bund เป็นวิว ที่ดีที่สุดของโรงแรมนี้

เครื่องใช้ต่างๆ ภายในห้องใช้ของคุณภาพดี เตียงดูดวิญญาน ไม่อยากจะลุกออกไปไหน ปลั๊ก มีพอใช้ เป็นแบบ Universal ชาร์ท มือถือสองเครื่อง กล้อง 2 ตัวไม่ต้องต่อปลั๊กพ่วง Amenity ให้มาเป็นของ Asprey 

แม่บ้านมาทำความสะอาด มีการสังเกตุว่าเรารับประทานน้ำเยอะ ก็นำมาให้เพิ่มเองโดยไม่ได้ร้องขอ พร้อมเขียนโน้ตไว้ให้ ว่าฉันเห็นคุณทานเยอะฉันจึงนำมาเพิ่มให้เพื่อความสะดวกของคุณ

มีข้อสังเกตุ อยู่ที่อาหารเช้า และอาหารใน Club อาจจะไม่หลากหลาย แต่โดยรวมคุณภาพก็ยังดีมากๆ แนะนำให้ไปทาน Afternoon tea ถ้ามาพักห้องพักแบบ Club สั่ง High tea set ดีมากๆ

โลเคชั่น ดีที่สุด อยู่เหนือห้าง IFC มีแทบจะทุกแบรนเนม เดินไปไม่ไกลมากก็ถึง MRT , Pearl tower , Shanghai tower ไม่ค่อยวุ่นวาย แต่ถ้าชอบ สีสันตอนกลางคืน อาจจะต้องไป จองโรงแรมอื่นบริเวณ People square

Flair bar แนะนำว่า ถ้ามาเข้าพักให้จองกับทางโรงแรมไปเลย ถ้าไม่ได้พักต้อง walkin เท่านั้น แต่ถ้าจอง ทางโรงแรมจะจัดที่นั่งที่ติดหน้าต่าง - ระเบียงไว้ให้ ซึ่งดีกว่ามากๆ หน้าหนาว bar จะปิด zone out door เพราะหนาวมาก

reviews.title: 很糟糕的体验
reviews.text: 因为朋友家结婚所以住在金茂附近，酒店的位置不错但是被客服的态度震撼了。晚上十二点多隔壁来了一帮人像是开party一样，吵得根本没法睡觉。打给客服客服回复说马上派人上来，过了半个小时对面还是很吵而客服根本没有出现，随后又打了一个电话，前台说那个人在来的路上。然后到了一点半根本没人出现，知道和我同行的人再次打电话央求前台快点来个人让隔壁安静一点。整件事情到了快两点才解决，而且客服走了隔壁还是继续吵闹。本来直接给他们换一个房间就没事了，我也不知道前台到底在干嘛。住宾馆结果被吵到三点多才睡着，第二天上班跟梦游一样。这是我目前住酒店体验最差的一次，没有之一。

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text: 1.CHECK IN 的时候让我们等了半天，CHECK IN 完了还要让我们等。2.我们定的时候特意勾选了双人床，我们不是情侣，但是到了RITZ给我们安排的是大床房，我们其实挺理解正直假期，人肯定多，没有双床房，但是！服务人员跟我们是这样解释的，说前台已经查询了我们没有定双床房，这不是我们的责任，还和我们说现在如果您不满意的话我们可以马上为您办理退房。我立马和AGODA打电话询问我当时的预定情况，结果AGODA告诉我我确实在特殊备注上勾选的双床房，酒店预订部是可以查到的，我的情绪一下就不好了，首先服务人员并没有在完全核实清楚的情况下就先推脱责任，并且在五一期间跟我们说让我们退房，请问我们退了房能定到哪里？问题已经升级，事后经理出面解决的问题，免费给我们升级了套间及赠送了行政服务。经理的服务态度及沟通方式还是值得点赞的，但是服务人员的态度及沟通方法让我们真的很心寒。希望丽思能提高服务人员的服务态度，能让服务人员用心去服务，而不是光用脑子，再多的微笑，不用心也能让人觉得是虚情假意！

reviews.title: An Unforgettable Stay During Our Honeymoon – Thank You, Ritz-Carlton Shanghai!
reviews.text:
From the moment we arrived, the staff impressed us with their professionalism, kindness, and true dedication to service. Everyone we met was incredibly helpful and made us feel warmly welcomed.

Our room was absolutely stunning — beautifully decorated with an amazing view of the city. Without a doubt, it was the most beautiful room we stayed in during the first week of our honeymoon trip. Everything was spotless, elegant, and designed with great attention to detail.

Breakfasts were another highlight. Exceptionally rich, fresh, and delicious, with a variety of local and international options that made each morning a real pleasure.

A heartfelt thank you to the hotel team for the surprise honeymoon cake in our room. It was such a thoughtful gesture and made us feel truly special.

We’re so grateful for this experience — Ritz-Carlton Shanghai exceeded all our expectations. You made our honeymoon even more memorable. Thank you!
Alicja i Rafal

reviews.title: one unfriendly service attitude
reviews.text:
The hotel receptionist was very nice and considerate. We were warm welcomed to the room and briefed on the breakfast options. As we requested to reserve a bund view table for breakfast, but was told the rule is "first come first serve" basis. 

Thus, we  woke ourselves up early and in order to beat the crowd. When we reached the restaurant around 8am, we were so excited to see there were three empty bund view tables. However, we were told they were all taken??!! by the waitress in the reception of the restaurant. By no choice we were arranged at one of the corner table. After 10 mins, a westerner man was seated at one of the bund view table by the same waitress. We were surprised as we were told they were all taken ??!! 
As if the rule is "first come first serve" basic, no prior reservation can be done, we were surprised why hotel allow this kind of service attitude or someone break the rule her own special guests?? 
We were having breakfast the following morning, same lady same policy.  (her own policy, unfortunately) We were seated at the corner again overlooking those empty bund view tables.
Discriminative attitude should not be a norm.

Other than this, all are super!!

The Ritz-Carlton Shanghai, Pudong offers a luxurious urban retreat with breathtaking views of the Huangpu River and The Bund. Guests can enjoy premium amenities, including an indoor pool and a world-class spa.
The hotel itself exudes luxury and comfort — you feel completely at home.
Their customer service is absolutely outstanding!!!
I want to extend my heartfelt thanks to all the hotel staff for treating me like a VIP, for every little detail and thoughtful touch.
A special thanks to  Yana, you are a wonderful person. Thank you for your dedication, and thanks to the universe for bringing us together. I will always remember the time I spent there!
The hotel gave me exclusive gifts, noticed subtle details in my look, and wrote me warm wishes that brought tears to my eyes!
I highly recommend this hotel — if you are in Shanghai, this is the only place to stay. You won’t regret it!
reviews.negatives: Honestly, there was nothing I didn’t like. Everything exceeded my expectations — from the service and comfort to the atmosphere and attention to detail. It was a flawless stay.

reviews.title: Great hotel at a great location
reviews.positives: We recently stayed at this hotel and had a fantastic experience overall. The location is ideal, close to all the main attractions and easy to access. The staff were incredibly welcoming and attentive, ensuring every detail of our stay went smoothly. The service was top-notch, with quick responses to any requests and a genuine effort to make guests feel comfortable.
reviews.negatives: The only minor point I would mention is that the rooms could benefit from a slight update. While they were clean and well-maintained, a few modern touches and refurbishments would make them even more comfortable. Nonetheless, this didn’t detract much from our stay, and I would highly recommend this hotel to anyone looking for a wonderful experience!

reviews.title: Great Experience & a Ture 5-star Hotel
reviews.positives: 1. The staffs are super nice. After our 1st night of stay, I told them that the quilt is a little thick, they changed it for us right away; 2. The maid is really sweet, during her service, she saw me a little sick, she made me a hot water quickly, and asked to drink a lot of water; 3. The lounge staffs are also very considerable, they allowed me to wait for my husband to pick me up later at the lounge, and provided me with hot tea, even though we checked out; 4. Location is super too, you can enjoy Pearl tower and HuangPu river and city views when you have breakfast, lunch or dinner, or in your hotel room. Downstairs there is big scale modern super mall, where you can kill your time easily. Overall, it’s a great experience for us to stay in Ritz in Shanghai Pudong.
